matchStrings:
procedure (?<procedureName>Dependency_AddDotNet\d+(?:Asp|Desktop)?);?
begin?
  // https://dotnet\.microsoft\.com/download/dotnet/(?<packageName>\d+\.\d+)?
  if not Dependency_IsNetCoreInstalled\('(?<runtimeName>[^']+)', \d+, \d+, \d+\) then begin?
    Dependency_Add\('(?<archiveName>[^']+)' \+ Dependency_ArchSuffix \+ '\.exe',?
      '/lcid ' \+ IntToStr\(GetUILanguage\) \+ ' /passive /norestart',?
      '(?<displayNamePrefix>[^']+? )(?<currentValue>\d+\.\d+\.\d+)' \+ Dependency_ArchTitle,?
      Dependency_String\('https://builds\.dotnet\.microsoft\.com/dotnet/(?<downloadPath>[^']+?)/\d+\.\d+\.\d+/(?<binaryNamePrefix>[^']+?)-\d+\.\d+\.\d+-win-x86\.exe', 'https://builds\.dotnet\.microsoft\.com/dotnet/[^']+?/\d+\.\d+\.\d+/[^']+?-\d+\.\d+\.\d+-win-x64\.exe', 'https://builds\.dotnet\.microsoft\.com/dotnet/[^']+?/\d+\.\d+\.\d+/[^']+?-\d+\.\d+\.\d+-win-arm64\.exe'\),?
      '', False, False\);?
  end;?
end;
